mapper.select: SELECT id, title, COALESCE(description, '') as subtitle, image_url, link_type, link_value, link_url, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM banners ORDER BY sort_order DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT id, title, COALESCE(description, '') as subtitle, image_url, link_type, link_value, link_url, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM banners WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC

SELECT id, title, COALESCE(description, '') as subtitle, image_url, link_type, link_value, link_url, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM banners ORDER BY sort_order DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, title, COALESCE(description, '') as subtitle, image_url, link_type, link_value, link_url, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time FROM banners WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banners (title, description, image_url, link_type, link_value, link_url, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{image}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{targetUrl}, #{sort}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE banners SET title = #{title}, description = #{subtitle}, image_url = #{image}, link_type = #{type}, link_value = #{targetId}, link_url = #{targetUrl}, sort_order = #{sort}, is_enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE banners SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE banners SET sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE banners SET click_count = click_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
